channel.title: Amanda Bradford: The World Decision Case
channel.description: A Stanford GSB-style case study exploring Amanda Bradford's decision about joining Tools for Humanity/World. An in-depth analysis of founder-to-operator transitions, compensation negotiations, and strategic decision-making in the AI era.
channel.itunes:author: Amanda Bradford Case Study
channel.itunes:summary: A comprehensive case study examining Amanda Bradford's strategic decision about joining Tools for Humanity as Head of World ID, GTM & Solutions. Explores the intersection of AI, identity verification, marketplace design, and founder psychology.

item.title: Complete Case Study: Amanda Bradford and the Human Internet Bet
item.description: The complete Stanford GSB-style case study exploring Amanda Bradford's strategic decision about joining Tools for Humanity/World as Head of World ID, GTM & Solutions. This comprehensive analysis covers her post-League founder journey, marketplace thesis, the World opportunity, interview process learnings, external reality checks, compensation negotiations, and the ultimate decision framework. A deep dive into founder-to-operator transitions, AI-era infrastructure challenges, and strategic career decisions at the intersection of identity, marketplaces, and the future of human verification online.
item.itunes:summary: Complete case study covering Amanda Bradford's marketplace thesis, World's proof-of-human challenge, interview learnings from Alex Blania and team, Tinder integration reality checks, token compensation complexities, and the strategic decision framework for founder-to-operator career transitions.
